programme.desc: Forbidden Science is a unique blend of noir science fiction and erotic programming. Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

In addition, we look at the challenges and the technology involved in setting up a racecourse for watersports such as kiteboarding, sailing, and stand-up paddleboarding.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep113: Lions of the Deep
programme.desc: In the past 50 years, sea lion populations have declined more than 80% along the North Pacific coast. Scientists at the University of British Columbia, and the Vancouver Aquarium, are working together to help save North America’s iconic and largest pinniped - the stellar sea lion.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Back by unpopular demand, the infamous “Blah Line” returns—and it’s more brutal than ever. The contestants kick off the day with a hellish PT session that leaves bodies broken and spirits tested. Things only get rougher from there with a punishing stealth crawl over jagged rocks, grinding them down before they face Ken Shamrock’s infamous Lion’s Den training—a relentless gauntlet of pain, grit, and raw endurance. As Don Mann continues to forge a battle-ready team, the squad is thrown into breaching drills designed for high-stakes mission execution. It’s chaos, it’s calculated, and it separates the contenders from the pretenders. In the heat of the action, two standouts emerge from the ranks—earning the coveted role of designated breachers.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Kyle Reyes checks in with Advanced Vitality to see how the team’s recommendations have already begun transforming their impact on clients. At Scout & Zoe’s, Cindy unveils a bold new commercial that captures her brand’s quirky spirit while driving sales in a competitive pet market. Over at Zenith Trek, a polished new promo video helps position their innovative product in front of the right audience. And down on the floor at Hammer Haag Steel, it’s lights, camera, action—dirty jobs style—as the crew captures raw, behind-the-scenes footage that showcases their powerful manufacturing capabilities.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: The A-Team kicks things off with Bonnie Lucas of Law Enforcement Specialists, who’s on a mission to scale her police coordination service nationwide—with a game-changing app in the works. Then it’s all about beauty and impact as gallery owner David Beavis shares how his immersive landscape photography is inspiring audiences and fueling plans for expansion. Next, Eric Couch of Provision Brokerage breaks down how his firm is helping Americans retire with confidence—no market risk, just guaranteed income for life. Finally, John Feldman introduces Connected & Protected, a tech-forward company keeping seniors and first responders safe across the country.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: From the ocean to the lab, The Big Reveal dives deeper into the hidden impact of electromagnetic pollution. Discover how Aires Tech is helping people, animals, and even bees thrive—unlocking the secrets to balance, vitality, and true wellness in our connected age.

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: In the premiere of Fortress, Sheriff Mark Lamb and co-hosts explore America’s urgent need for security—both personal and societal. They meet a passionate team turning donated land into a homestead that feeds and shelters trafficking survivors. Then, CCW Safe steps in to showcase how legal protection for concealed carriers can be the line between justice and ruin. Powerful stories of resilience, protection, and purpose unfold in this compelling first episode.

programme.title: Outlaws Paradise 1939
programme.desc: A notorious outlaw gang finds refuge in a remote desert hideout they call “paradise,” using it as a base for their criminal operations. When a determined lawman tracks them down, he goes undercover to infiltrate the group and bring them to justice. As tensions rise and loyalties are tested, a final showdown looms that will decide the fate of the outlaws and restore order to the frontier

programme.title: Outlaws Of Boulder Pass 1942,
programme.desc: A lawman goes undercover to infiltrate a gang of outlaws operating out of Boulder Pass, uncovering a scheme of robbery and murder while working to bring the criminals to justice.

programme.title: Rustlers’ Hideout (1945)
programme.desc: Billy Carson and his sidekick Fuzzy Q. Jones investigate a series of cattle rustlings, uncovering a gang of outlaws operating from a hidden hideout as they work to bring the criminals to justice.

programme.title: Judge Priest - 1934
programme.desc: In a small Southern town after the Civil War, a wise and folksy judge, played by Will Rogers, presides over local disputes with humor, compassion, and common sense. As he navigates courtroom cases and community tensions, he stands up for fairness and decency while bringing people together in a divided society.

programme.title: Rawhide (1938)
programme.desc: A ranch foreman finds himself caught in a conflict over land and cattle when a ruthless gang begins targeting local operations, forcing him to stand up against the outlaws and protect the community

programme.title: Dead Men Don't Make Shadows 1970
programme.desc: In Dead Men Don’t Make Shadows, Hunt Powers stars as a deadly bounty hunter whose gun is as quick as his temper. Tracking ruthless outlaws across a frontier steeped in greed and bloodshed, he discovers a web of betrayal that forces him to fight not just for money, but for survival. With stylish shootouts, double-crosses, and the grit of classic Spaghetti Western flair, this tale of vengeance proves that in the West, only the fastest survive.

programme.title: Stormy Trails
programme.desc: A rancher caught in the middle of a bank robbery shoots one of the robbers. However, the dead bandit turns out to be a former ranch hand who was suing him. The rancher is arrested for murder.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: Wealthy rancher G. W. McLintock uses his power and influence in the territory to keep the peace between farmers, ranchers, land-grabbers, Indians and corrupt government officials.

programme.title: Westward Bound 1944
programme.desc: “Ken Maynard rides tall in Westward Bound, a fast-paced Western of courage and justice on the open trail. When ruthless outlaws threaten to seize control of frontier lands, Maynard saddles up to defend the settlers and restore order. With hard-riding action, blazing gunfights, and Maynard’s trademark grit, this classic delivers straight-shooting adventure on the lawless frontier.

programme.title: Code of the Cactus
programme.desc: When Blackton outbids Bill Carson. Bill suspects he will have to rustle cattle to fulfill the contract. So Bill arrives posing as an Mexican. When he rustles the cattle from the rustlers, it gets him into the gang. Hoping to bring them all to justice, he is in trouble when his true identity is revealed.

programme.title: Local Love: The Naked Truth About Dating
programme.desc: Single Samuel is a man on the move looking to find the right woman to settle down with and start a family in Sacramento. He’s in for a treat with a trip to a goat farm, a loop around a rollerskating rink and a very revealing art experience.

programme.title: Refugees Welcome: A Story of Immigration to America's Heartland
programme.desc: Refugees Welcome documents how one Governor’s brave decision to welcome refugees during the Vietnam War had far reaching repercussions not only for the country but, generations later, for the fate of his own family.

programme.title: Boston Rob Does Beantown: Chinatown Treats
programme.desc: Rob feasts on fabulous cuisine, makes more than a few new friends and joins a trampoline gym class in one of Boston's oldest neighborhoods.

programme.title: Heroes On Call: The Forgotten Story of America's First Paramedics
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Americans were dying at shocking rates due to inadequate emergency care. Enter Freedom House Ambulance Service: the first paramedics unit in the U.S., run and staffed by Black men and women. This is the origin story of EMS.

programme.title: Stitch: Heartwarming Viral Sensations Worth the Replay
programme.desc: Going viral is harder than it seems. These stories showcase the moments that cut through the noise, whether they made someone laugh or warmed a heart.
